# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend Layer**: React components with TypeScript for type safety
- **State Management**: React Query for server state, React hooks for local state
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library
- **Backend**: Supabase providing database, authentication, and file storage
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod schema validation

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth for user authentication with persistent sessions
- Role-based access control (RBAC) with hierarchical permissions
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies in PostgreSQL for data access control
- Protected routes that redirect unauthorized users

### Component Structure
- Layout components (AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar) for consistent UI
- Page components for route handling
- Reusable UI components from shadcn/ui library
- Custom hooks for business logic separation

### Data Flow
- React Query for API calls and caching
- Supabase client for database operations
- Optimistic updates and error handling
- Real-time subscriptions for live data (planned)

## Key Files & Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders root React component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main application component with routing and providers
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Placeholder component (not actively used)

### Layout Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and content area
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Collapsible navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Header component showing page titles

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx`: Custom hook managing authentication state and user data
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control logic and route permissions

### UI Components
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: React Router NavLink wrapper with active state styling
- `src/components/ui/`: shadcn/ui component library (40+ components)

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: TypeScript types generated from database schema

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS configuration
- `tsconfig.json`: TypeScript configuration
- `eslint.config.js`: ESLint configuration
- `playwright.config.ts`: End-to-end testing configuration

## Database Schema & Relationships

### Core Tables

**employees**
- `id` (uuid, primary key)
- `auth_user_id` (uuid, references auth.users)
- `company_id` (uuid, references companies)
- `full_name` (text)
- `email` (text)
- `employee_code` (text)
- `designation` (text)
- `department` (text)
- `avatar_url` (text)
- `status` (text, default 'active')

**companies**
- `id` (uuid, primary key)
- `name` (text)
- `slug` (text, unique)

**roles**
- `id` (uuid, primary key)
- `company_id` (uuid, references companies)
- `name` (text)

**employee_roles**
- `employee_id` (uuid, references employees)
- `role_id` (uuid, references roles)
- Composite primary key on (employee_id, role_id)

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to one company
- Employees can have one role through employee_roles junction table
- Roles are scoped to companies (multi-tenant support)
- Auth users are linked to employees via auth_user_id

### Security Functions
- `get_employee_by_auth_id(uuid)`: Retrieves employee data for authenticated user
- `get_employee_role_for_auth(uuid)`: Gets role name for authenticated user
- `get_employee_id_for_auth(uuid)`: Gets employee ID for authenticated user
- `get_company_id_for_auth(uuid)`: Gets company ID for authenticated user

### Row Level Security Policies
- Employees can only access their own data
- Managers (hr_manager, finance_manager, ceo) can access all employees in their company
- HR and CEO can modify employee data
- Role-based access to storage buckets (employee avatars)

## Business Logic & Data Flow

### Authentication Flow
1. User logs in via Supabase Auth
2. Auth state triggers employee data fetch
3. Role permissions determine accessible routes
4. Protected routes check access before rendering

### Employee Management
- HR Managers and CEOs can create/edit employees
- Finance Managers can view employee data for payroll
- Employees can only view their own profile
- Avatar uploads restricted to HR/CEO roles

### Navigation & Routing
- Sidebar dynamically shows menu items based on user role
- Route protection prevents unauthorized access
- Page titles update based on current route
- Collapsible sidebar for better UX

### State Management
- React Query caches API responses
- Auth state managed globally via context
- Local component state for UI interactions
- Form state handled by React Hook Form

## Development & Testing

### Build System
- Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- TypeScript for compile-time type checking
- ESLint for code quality
- PostCSS with Tailwind for styling

### Testing Strategy
- Vitest for unit tests
- Playwright for end-to-end testing
- React Testing Library for component testing
- Test setup in `src/test/setup.ts`

### Environment Configuration
- Environment variables for Supabase configuration
- Separate configs for development/production
- TypeScript path mapping for clean imports

## Performance Considerations

- Code splitting via Vite dynamic imports
- React Query caching reduces API calls
- Optimized bundle with tree shaking
- Lazy loading for route components (not yet implemented)
- Efficient re-renders with React.memo where appropriate

## Future Enhancements

Based on sidebar navigation, planned features include:
- Attendance tracking system
- Leave management workflow
- Payroll calculation engine
- Project management tools
- Performance evaluation system
- Notification system
- Advanced reporting and analytics
